bead.title: artifacts: publish facet contract + add phase/prefix args+chips
bead.description: Publish the URL/key facet contract (q, mediaType, staleness, phase, prefix, sort). Add phase + prefix args server-side and chips client-side. Coordinate with Story 5 final taxonomy.
bead.acceptance: 1. Server: phase + prefix arg in artifacts query. 2. Client: phase + prefix chips. 3. URL contract documented in code comment AND in TD if one exists. 4. Tests cover all 6 reserved keys.
